Class OfferTile

java.lang.Object
it.polimi.ingsw.am22.model.OfferTile
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class OfferTile extends Object implements Serializable
A tile on the offer track. A player places their totem on a tile to claim its action: take a fixed number of cards from the upper and/or lower row and/or gain food. Each tile is identified by a letter and can hold a single totem.
See Also:

  • Constructor Details

    • OfferTile

      public OfferTile(char letter, int upperCardsToTake, int lowerCardsToTake, int foodReward)
      Parameters:
      letter - the tile's identifying letter
      upperCardsToTake - how many cards must be taken from the upper row
      lowerCardsToTake - how many cards must be taken from the lower row
      foodReward - the food granted by this tile

  • Method Details

    • isAvailable

      public boolean isAvailable()
      Returns:
      true if no totem occupies this tile

    • placeTotem

      public void placeTotem(Totem totem)
      Places a totem on this tile.
      Parameters:
      totem - the totem to place

    • clear

      public void clear()
      Clears the totem from this tile, making it available again.

    • getLetter

      public char getLetter()
      Returns:
      the tile's identifying letter

    • getUpperCardsToTake

      public int getUpperCardsToTake()
      Returns:
      how many cards must be taken from the upper row

    • getLowerCardsToTake

      public int getLowerCardsToTake()
      Returns:
      how many cards must be taken from the lower row

    • getFoodReward

      public int getFoodReward()
      Returns:
      the food granted by this tile

    • getOccupiedBy

      public Totem getOccupiedBy()
      Returns:
      the totem on this tile, or null if available
